# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release and Publish Pipeline

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+'
      - 'v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-rc.[0-9]+'

permissions: {}

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '20'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'

jobs:
  validate-tag:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.extract.outputs.version }}
      is_prerelease: ${{ steps.extract.outputs.is_prerelease }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Validate tag format and extract version
        id: extract
        run: |
          TAG_NAME="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"

          if [[ ! "${TAG_NAME}" =~ ^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+(-rc\.[0-9]+)?$ ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid tag format: ${TAG_NAME}. Expected v<major>.<minor>.<patch> or v<major>.<minor>.<patch>-rc.<number>"
            exit 1
          fi

          VERSION="${TAG_NAME#v}"
          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

          if [[ "${TAG_NAME}" == *"-rc."* ]]; then
            echo "is_prerelease=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "is_prerelease=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          echo "Validated tag: ${TAG_NAME}, version: ${VERSION}"

      - name: Verify tag is signed or from trusted source
        run: |
          TAG_NAME="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"
          TAG_SHA=$(git rev-list -n 1 "refs/tags/${TAG_NAME}")
          BRANCH_CONTAINS=$(git branch -r --contains "${TAG_SHA}" | grep -c 'origin/main\|origin/release' || true)

          if [ "${BRANCH_CONTAINS}" -eq 0 ]; then
            echo "::error::Tag ${TAG_NAME} does not point to a commit on main or release branch"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Verify version consistency in package files
        run: |
          VERSION="${{ steps.extract.outputs.version }}"

          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            PKG_VERSION=$(jq -r '.version' package.json)
            if [ "${PKG_VERSION}" != "${VERSION}" ]; then
              echo "::error::package.json version (${PKG_VERSION}) does not match tag version (${VERSION})"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            PYPROJECT_VERSION=$(grep -Po '(?<=^version = ")[^"]*' pyproject.toml || true)
            if [ -n "${PYPROJECT_VERSION}" ] && [ "${PYPROJECT_VERSION}" != "${VERSION}" ]; then
              echo "::error::pyproject.toml version (${PYPROJECT_VERSION}) does not match tag version (${VERSION})"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

          if [ -f "setup.py" ]; then
            SETUP_VERSION=$(python3 -c "
          import ast, sys
          with open('setup.py') as f:
              tree = ast.parse(f.read())
          for node in ast.walk(tree):
              if isinstance(node, ast.Call) and hasattr(node, 'keywords'):
                  for kw in node.keywords:
                      if kw.arg == 'version' and isinstance(kw.value, ast.Constant):
                          print(kw.value.value)
                          sys.exit(0)
          " 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "${SETUP_VERSION}" ] && [ "${SETUP_VERSION}" != "${VERSION}" ]; then
              echo "::error::setup.py version (${SETUP_VERSION}) does not match tag version (${VERSION})"
              exit 1
            fi
          fi

  build-node:
    needs: validate-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      artifact-hash: ${{ steps.hash.outputs.artifact_hash }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check if Node.js project exists
        id: check_node
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            echo "exists=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "exists=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Install dependencies with lockfile
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
            npm ci --ignore-scripts
          elif [ -f "yarn.lock" ]; then
            corepack enable
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile
          else
            echo "::error::No lockfile found. Releases require a lockfile for reproducible builds."
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Run security audit
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: npm audit --audit-level=high || true

      - name: Run tests
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: npm test --if-present

      - name: Run linting
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: npm run lint --if-present

      - name: Build project
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: npm run build --if-present

      - name: Create npm package tarball
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          npm pack
          mkdir -p dist/npm
          mv *.tgz dist/npm/

      - name: Generate artifact hash
        id: hash
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          cd dist/npm
          sha256sum *.tgz > checksums-npm.sha256
          HASH=$(cat checksums-npm.sha256 | base64 -w0)
          echo "artifact_hash=${HASH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Upload Node.js build artifacts
        if: steps.check_node.outputs.exists == 'true'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: npm-package
          path: dist/npm/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  build-python:
    needs: validate-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      artifact-hash: ${{ steps.hash.outputs.artifact_hash }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check if Python project exists
        id: check_python
        run: |
          if [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] || [ -f "setup.py" ] || [ -f "setup.cfg" ]; then
            echo "exists=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "exists=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Setup Python
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Install build dependencies
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install build twine

      - name: Install project dependencies
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
            python -m pip install -r requirements.txt
          elif [ -f "pyproject.toml" ]; then
            python -m pip install ".[dev]" 2>/dev/null || python -m pip install "." 2>/dev/null || true
          fi

      - name: Run tests
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f "pytest.ini" ] || [ -f "pyproject.toml" ] || [ -f "setup.cfg" ]; then
            python -m pytest --tb=short -q 2>/dev/null || echo "::warning::Tests not configured or failed"
          fi

      - name: Build Python package
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          python -m build
          mkdir -p dist/python
          mv dist/*.whl dist/*.tar.gz dist/python/ 2>/dev/null || true

      - name: Verify package with twine
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: python -m twine check dist/python/*

      - name: Generate artifact hash
        id: hash
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        run: |
          cd dist/python
          sha256sum * > checksums-python.sha256
          HASH=$(cat checksums-python.sha256 | base64 -w0)
          echo "artifact_hash=${HASH}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Upload Python build artifacts
        if: steps.check_python.outputs.exists == 'true'
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: dist/python/
          retention-days: 5
          if-no-files-found: error

  generate-changelog:
    needs: validate-tag
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    outputs:
      changelog: ${{ steps.changelog.outputs.changelog }}
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Generate changelog from commits
        id: changelog
        run: |
          CURRENT_TAG="${GITHUB_REF_NAME}"

          PREVIOUS_TAG=$(git tag --list 'v*' --sort=-version:refname | grep -v "${CURRENT_TAG}" | head -n 1)

          if [ -z "${PREVIOUS_TAG}" ]; then
            COMMIT_RANGE="HEAD"
          else
            COMMIT_RANGE="${PREVIOUS_TAG}..${CURRENT_TAG}"
          fi

          {
            echo "changelog<<CHANGELOG_EOF"
            echo "## What's Changed"
            echo ""

            FEATURES=$(git log "${COMMIT_RANGE}" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^feat" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "${FEATURES}" ]; then
              echo "### 🚀 Features"
              echo "${FEATURES}" | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "- ${line}"; done
              echo ""
            fi

            FIXES=$(git log "${COMMIT_RANGE}" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^fix" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "${FIXES}" ]; then
              echo "### 🐛 Bug Fixes"
              echo "${FIXES}" | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "- ${line}"; done
              echo ""
            fi

            BREAKING=$(git log "${COMMIT_RANGE}" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="BREAKING CHANGE" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "${BREAKING}" ]; then
              echo "### ⚠️ Breaking Changes"
              echo "${BREAKING}" | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "- ${line}"; done
              echo ""
            fi

            DOCS=$(git log "${COMMIT_RANGE}" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^docs" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "${DOCS}" ]; then
              echo "### 📚 Documentation"
              echo "${DOCS}" | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "- ${line}"; done
              echo ""
            fi

            OTHER=$(git log "${COMMIT_RANGE}" --pretty=format:"%s (%h)" --grep="^chore\|^ci\|^refactor\|^perf\|^style\|^test" 2>/dev/null || true)
            if [ -n "${OTHER}" ]; then
              echo "### 🔧 Other Changes"
              echo "${OTHER}" | while IFS= read -r line; do echo "- ${line}"; done
              echo ""
            fi

            if [ -n "${PREVIOUS_TAG}" ]; then
              echo "**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/compare/${PREVIOUS_TAG}...${CURRENT_TAG}"
            fi

            echo "CHANGELOG_EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

  create-github-release:
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - build-node
      - build-python
      - generate-changelog
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: write
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Download npm artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: npm-package
          path: release-assets/npm/
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Download Python artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: release-assets/python/
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Generate combined checksums
        run: |
          mkdir -p release-assets/checksums
          find release-assets -type f \( -name "*.tgz" -o -name "*.whl" -o -name "*.tar.gz" \) -exec sha256sum {} \; > release-assets/checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt
          cat release-assets/checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt

      - name: Prepare release assets
        id: prepare_assets
        run: |
          ASSETS=""
          for file in release-assets/npm/*.tgz release-assets/python/*.whl release-assets/python/*.tar.gz release-assets/checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt; do
            if [ -f "${file}" ]; then
              ASSETS="${ASSETS} ${file}"
            fi
          done
          echo "files=${ASSETS}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Create GitHub Release
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          VERSION: ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}
          IS_PRERELEASE: ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.is_prerelease }}
          CHANGELOG: ${{ needs.generate-changelog.outputs.changelog }}
          TAG_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          REPO: ${{ github.repository }}
        run: |
          RELEASE_ARGS=(
            "${TAG_NAME}"
            --repo "${REPO}"
            --title "Release ${TAG_NAME}"
            --notes "${CHANGELOG}"
            --verify-tag
          )

          if [ "${IS_PRERELEASE}" = "true" ]; then
            RELEASE_ARGS+=(--prerelease)
          fi

          for file in release-assets/npm/*.tgz release-assets/python/*.whl release-assets/python/*.tar.gz release-assets/checksums/SHA256SUMS.txt; do
            if [ -f "${file}" ]; then
              RELEASE_ARGS+=("${file}")
            fi
          done

          gh release create "${RELEASE_ARGS[@]}"

  publish-npm:
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - build-node
      - create-github-release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    environment: npm-publish
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check if npm publish is needed
        id: check
        run: |
          if [ -f "package.json" ]; then
            echo "should_publish=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "should_publish=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Download npm artifacts
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: npm-package
          path: dist/npm/

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        run: |
          cd dist/npm
          if [ -f "checksums-npm.sha256" ]; then
            sha256sum -c checksums-npm.sha256
          else
            echo "::error::Checksum file not found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: 'https://registry.npmjs.org'

      - name: Determine npm tag
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        id: npm_tag
        run: |
          if [ "${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.is_prerelease }}" = "true" ]; then
            echo "tag=next" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "tag=latest" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Publish to npm
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        run: |
          TARBALL=$(ls dist/npm/*.tgz | head -n 1)
          npm publish "${TARBALL}" --tag "${{ steps.npm_tag.outputs.tag }}" --provenance --access public
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}

      - name: Verify published package
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        run: |
          PACKAGE_NAME=$(jq -r '.name' package.json)
          VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"

          sleep 10

          RETRIES=5
          for i in $(seq 1 ${RETRIES}); do
            if npm view "${PACKAGE_NAME}@${VERSION}" version 2>/dev/null; then
              echo "Package ${PACKAGE_NAME}@${VERSION} successfully published"
              exit 0
            fi
            echo "Attempt ${i}/${RETRIES}: Package not yet available, waiting..."
            sleep 15
          done

          echo "::warning::Could not verify package publication within timeout"

  publish-pypi:
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - build-python
      - create-github-release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      id-token: write
    environment: pypi-publish
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Download Python artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: python-package
          path: dist/python/
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Check if PyPI publish is needed
        id: check
        run: |
          if ls dist/python/*.whl dist/python/*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "should_publish=true" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "should_publish=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

      - name: Verify artifact integrity
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        run: |
          cd dist/python
          if [ -f "checksums-python.sha256" ]; then
            sha256sum -c checksums-python.sha256
          else
            echo "::error::Checksum file not found"
            exit 1
          fi

      - name: Setup Python
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Install twine
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        run: python -m pip install --upgrade twine

      - name: Publish to PyPI using trusted publisher (OIDC)
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        uses: pypa/gh-action-pypi-publish@release/v1
        with:
          packages-dir: dist/python/
          skip-existing: false
          verbose: true

      - name: Verify published package
        if: steps.check.outputs.should_publish == 'true'
        run: |
          VERSION="${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}"

          PACKAGE_NAME=""
          for file in dist/python/*.whl; do
            if [ -f "${file}" ]; then
              BASENAME=$(basename "${file}")
              PACKAGE_NAME=$(echo "${BASENAME}" | sed 's/-[0-9].*//' | tr '_' '-')
              break
            fi
          done

          if [ -z "${PACKAGE_NAME}" ]; then
            echo "::warning::Could not determine package name for verification"
            exit 0
          fi

          sleep 30

          RETRIES=5
          for i in $(seq 1 ${RETRIES}); do
            HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://pypi.org/pypi/${PACKAGE_NAME}/${VERSION}/json")
            if [ "${HTTP_CODE}" = "200" ]; then
              echo "Package ${PACKAGE_NAME}==${VERSION} successfully published to PyPI"
              exit 0
            fi
            echo "Attempt ${i}/${RETRIES}: Package not yet available (HTTP ${HTTP_CODE}), waiting..."
            sleep 30
          done

          echo "::warning::Could not verify package publication within timeout"

  post-release-notification:
    needs:
      - validate-tag
      - create-github-release
      - publish-npm
      - publish-pypi
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    if: always()
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Summarize release status
        env:
          VERSION: ${{ needs.validate-tag.outputs.version }}
          TAG_NAME: ${{ github.ref_name }}
          RELEASE_RESULT: ${{ needs.create-github-release.result }}
          NPM_RESULT: ${{ needs.publish-npm.result }}
          PYPI_RESULT: ${{ needs.publish-pypi.result }}
        run: |
          echo "## Release Summary for ${TAG_NAME}" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| Component | Status |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "|-----------|--------|" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| GitHub Release | ${RELEASE_RESULT} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| npm Publish | ${NPM_RESULT} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "| PyPI Publish | ${PYPI_RESULT} |" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"

          if [ "${RELEASE_RESULT}" = "failure" ] || [ "${NPM_RESULT}" = "failure" ] || [ "${PYPI_RESULT}" = "failure" ]; then
            echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            echo "⚠️ **One or more release steps failed. Please investigate.**" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
          echo "✅ **Release ${TAG_NAME} completed successfully!**" >> "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"
